# v1.1.0 release notes

A safer and clearer update system.

## What's new

- Update OS now installs from published release tags instead of the moving branch tip.
- The updater stages and verifies files before applying them.
- The updater keeps backups and supports undoing the last update.
- Settings now shows update controls and the current version.
- The dashboard is cleaner and easier to read.
- The install path is now framed as an advanced external-drive setup command: `sudo ai-os-install-to-disk`.
- The docs now match the v1.1 updater and dashboard workflow.

## Updating from v1.0.2

Use Update OS as usual when the update is offered. Your projects and data in `~/workspace` are not touched.

## Updating from v1.0.0 / v1.0.1

Use the one-time bootstrap command:

```sh
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jackwayne234/Ascended-Barron-Groundtruth-OS/main/bootstrap-updater.sh | bash
```

Prefer manual steps:

```sh
git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/jackwayne234/Ascended-Barron-Groundtruth-OS.git /tmp/abgt
sudo install -m755 /tmp/abgt/airootfs/usr/local/bin/ai-os-update /usr/local/bin/
sudo install -m755 /tmp/abgt/airootfs/usr/local/bin/ai-os-rollback /usr/local/bin/ 2>/dev/null || true
sudo install -d /usr/local/share/ai-os
ai-os-update
```

## Verify download

```sh
sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
```

You want to see `OK` next to the ISO name.

## Release verification

Built by GitHub Actions from tag `v1.1.0`. The published ISO was downloaded, verified with `sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS`, and inspected to confirm the embedded OS reports `INSTALLED_VERSION` as `v1.1.0`.
